PER THE REPRESENTATION OF THE MOVING PARTY ON NOVEMBER 15, 2011, THIS CASE IS SINGLY ASSIGNED TO JUDGE RICHARD KRAMER AND THUS THE MOTION NEEDS TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE KRAMER.
